description_long: This object is a modern grave site set on a rectangular stone platform with a paved border. The main feature is a two-tone upright headstone, with one side in polished black stone and the other in a lighter, textured gray stone, the latter bearing a carved cross. In front of the headstone is a large, flat grave cover made of matching gray stone. Three black stone cubes, each topped with a white spherical ornament, are arranged in a row beside the grave, likely serving as candle holders or decorative elements. The entire grave is surrounded by a neatly patterned stone or concrete tile surface, demarcating the burial plot from its surroundings. The headstone includes visible inscriptions and a cross, indicating its commemorative function.
description: A modern grave site with a two-tone upright headstone, a large stone grave cover, and three black stone cubes with white ornaments, all set on a paved platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black and gray upright headstone, the grave cover, and three black cubes with white spheres on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone and the full length of the grave cover, with the three black cubes aligned at the back.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the headstone inscriptions, the cross, and the arrangement of the black cubes with white spheres.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grave cover and the three black cubes, with the headstone seen edge-on.
